title: mesotriche longiflora
intro: Mesotriche longiflora, also known as long-flowered mesotriche, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing sore throats. Mesotriche longiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
